title: Spicy Light Indulgent Brazilian Bulgur Wheat Stir-fry
description: This indulgent dish features a blend of spicy bhuna spices to add depth and lightness with the use of bulgur wheat in an easy-to-prepare vegan-friendly stir-fry.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp red chili powder (adjust to taste)

instructions: Rinse the bulgur wheat under cold water and soak in water for 15-20 minutes.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil, onion, bell pepper, and garlic; stir-fry for about 5 minutes until vegetables are tender-crisp.
Drain the bulgur wheat, reserving some soaking water if needed, then add to the wok with the onions, peppers, and garlic. Stir well.

In a small saucepan, combine water or broth, turmeric powder, black pepper powder, garam masala, red chili powder, and reserved soaking water from the bulgur wheat. Bring to a boil and pour over the bulgur mixture in the wok.
Stir continuously for another 2-3 minutes until all liquid is absorbed and ingredients are heated through.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
